_about: Auto-extracted from the deck grammars by scripts/analyze_numbers.py. Evidence for research/synthesis/numbers.json — every reading links back to <deck>#<item>.

golden_dawn.title: Root of the Powers of Fire
golden_dawn.meaning: The seed of all fire — pure energy, the spark of creation and will at its origin.

golden_dawn.title: Root of the Powers of Earth
golden_dawn.meaning: The seed of all earth — the root of wealth, body, and material beginnings.

golden_dawn.title: Root of the Powers of Water
golden_dawn.meaning: The seed of all water — the wellspring of love, joy, and the fertilising emotions.

golden_dawn.title: Root of the Powers of Air
golden_dawn.meaning: The seed of all air — the sword of mind and truth, force invoked for good or ill.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Dominion
golden_dawn.meaning: Bold dominion and influence over others; authority established by will.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Harmonious Change
golden_dawn.meaning: Balancing flux, juggling demands, graceful adaptation to change.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Love
golden_dawn.meaning: Love, harmony, union, mutual attraction freely given.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Peace Restored
golden_dawn.meaning: Truce, a balance held by tension, peace restored after conflict.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Established Strength
golden_dawn.meaning: Established strength, enterprise realised, pride in work, help from others.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Material Works
golden_dawn.meaning: Skilled work, craft, building, recognition of one's ability.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Abundance
golden_dawn.meaning: Plenty, joy, celebration, the overflow shared among friends.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Sorrow
golden_dawn.meaning: Heartbreak, grief, separation — sorrow that clears the air.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Perfected Work
golden_dawn.meaning: Completion and rest after labour, harmony, the perfected work celebrated.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Earthly Power
golden_dawn.meaning: Security, holding, possession, the consolidation of gains.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Blended Pleasure
golden_dawn.meaning: Pleasure mixed with weariness, satiety, the apathy of having enough.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Rest from Strife
golden_dawn.meaning: Repose, recovery, retreat, the rest that heals.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Strife
golden_dawn.meaning: Competition, struggle, quarrels — the friction that sharpens.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Material Trouble
golden_dawn.meaning: Hardship, want, loss, the cold outside the lit window.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Loss in Pleasure
golden_dawn.meaning: Disappointment within plenty, sorrow, the cup spilled.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Defeat
golden_dawn.meaning: Defeat, loss, dishonour, the costs of winning at any price.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Victory
golden_dawn.meaning: Victory after strife, success, recognition, good news arriving.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Material Success
golden_dawn.meaning: Generosity, fair exchange, success that is shared.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Pleasure
golden_dawn.meaning: Well-being, harmony, the sweet pleasure of memory and the past.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Earned Success
golden_dawn.meaning: Passage from trouble toward calmer water, progress earned.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Valour
golden_dawn.meaning: Courage against the odds, holding one's ground from a position of advantage.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Success Unfulfilled
golden_dawn.meaning: Patience, the pause before harvest, growth not yet realised.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Illusionary Success
golden_dawn.meaning: Illusion, fantasy, deceptive success, intoxication with one's own visions.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Unstable Effort
golden_dawn.meaning: Cunning, a partial and unreliable success, slipping away with the prize.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Swiftness
golden_dawn.meaning: Swift action and messages, energy rushing toward its aim.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Prudence
golden_dawn.meaning: Diligence, skill cultivated, the careful work of the apprentice.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Abandoned Success
golden_dawn.meaning: Leaving behind what was won to seek a deeper meaning; withdrawal.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Shortened Force
golden_dawn.meaning: Restriction, constraint, force turned against itself, indecision.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Great Strength
golden_dawn.meaning: Strength held in reserve, resilience, recovery, readiness for one more stand.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Material Gain
golden_dawn.meaning: Solitary plenty, refinement, material gain quietly enjoyed.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Material Happiness
golden_dawn.meaning: The 'wish' card — contentment, physical well-being, fulfilment.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Despair and Cruelty
golden_dawn.meaning: Anguish, nightmare, cruelty, the long night of despair.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Oppression
golden_dawn.meaning: Overload, burden, force used cruelly, the weight of too much carried.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Wealth
golden_dawn.meaning: Lasting wealth, family, inheritance, completion in the world of matter.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Perfected Success
golden_dawn.meaning: Lasting happiness, harmony, the suit fulfilled in shared joy.

golden_dawn.title: Lord of Ruin
golden_dawn.meaning: Ruin, the end of an illusion, the failure of force, rock bottom.
